context: Agent identifies all four anti-pattern violations in a proposed context file creation plan and provides corrected alternatives.

checklist.name: Skipping pre-creation check identified
checklist.description: antipattern-review.md flags the failure to check existing .context/ structure before creating the file.

checklist.name: Generic slug identified
checklist.description: antipattern-review.md flags 'notes' as a generic slug that risks collisions and violates the naming rule.

checklist.name: Mixed content types identified
checklist.description: antipattern-review.md identifies that the proposal mixes justification (GraphQL rationale), scratch (schema exploration), and plan (migration steps) in one file.

checklist.name: Missing frontmatter identified
checklist.description: antipattern-review.md flags the proposal to skip frontmatter as a violation of the ISO 8601 date requirement.

checklist.name: Corrected plan provided
checklist.description: antipattern-review.md ends with a corrected creation plan: three separate files with specific slugs, correct types, frontmatter, and a pre-creation ls check.
